name: SPY iron condor, 5-pt wings, constitution-compliant sizing (successor to the dead-as-specced 25-pt structure)
supersedes: vrp_preregistration.json#options_backtest (25-pt structure — dead-as-specced 2026-07-06, derivation in the VRP-001-OPTIONS ledger annotation)
prior_materials_banner: A1: the 2026-06-29 raised-account run (50t/Sh1.248) and every prior VRP result are context, never evidence; no parameter below is derived from them. Wings shrank by MECHANICAL derivation (width_$ <= account x risk_pct), not by performance tuning.

params.risk_note: 0.75% = RISK_CONSTITUTION Art.1 (DRAFT pending ratification; mandate-blessed for this spec)

sizing_derivation: worst-case max_loss = 5pt x $100 = $500/contract; floor(100000 x 0.0075 / 500) = 1 contract with 1.5x headroom — sizing can never be the silent killer again
expected_trade_cadence: ceiling 52/yr (Monday signal frequency; NOT derived from any prior run); realistic below that after entry conditions
falsification: the validator ladder verbatim (NOT_SIGNIFICANT | REJECTED_OOS | DATA_INSUFFICIENT | PARTIAL_CONFIRMATION); NO_TRADES at this account is a SPEC failure (falsifies the derivation), not a data gap
execution_precondition: UNRUN BY DESIGN. Running requires (1) Colin's acknowledgment of this spec, (2) validator wiring for v2 params (a future session's E-track), (3) E0 append-only persistence (shipped c9ad9ca).
hash_method: sha256 of json.dumps(doc, sort_keys=True, separators=(',',':')) where doc = this object MINUS the hash_lock field
